name: 生命周期
subject: science
curriculum_points: Bp.05 Describe the stages in a plant's life cycle, including seed, germination, growth and reproduction.
Ba.06 Describe the differences in the life cycles of a mammal, an amphibian, an insect and a bird.
Bh.06 Describe the changes as humans develop to old age.
